tasks.label: Zephyr: Export Paths
tasks.command: wsl bash -lc "export ZEPHYR_BASE=~/zephyrproject/zephyr && source ~/zephyrproject/.venv/bin/activate && echo ZEPHYR_BASE=$ZEPHYR_BASE && python --version"

tasks.label: Zephyr: Build M0
tasks.command: wsl bash -lc "cd ~/projects/psoc_062_4343W && export ZEPHYR_BASE=~/zephyrproject/zephyr && source ~/zephyrproject/.venv/bin/activate && west build -b cy8cproto_062_4343w_m0"

tasks.label: Zephyr: Build M4
tasks.command: wsl bash -lc "cd ~/projects/psoc_062_4343W && export ZEPHYR_BASE=~/zephyrproject/zephyr && source ~/zephyrproject/.venv/bin/activate && west build -b cy8cproto_062_4343w"

tasks.label: Zephyr: Flash (pyocd)
tasks.command: wsl bash -lc "cd ~/projects/psoc_062_4343W && export ZEPHYR_BASE=~/zephyrproject/zephyr && source ~/zephyrproject/.venv/bin/activate && west flash -r pyocd"
